projects.title: Reusable Enterprise RAG Platform
projects.subtitle: Config-Driven Knowledge Systems for Huntington National Bank
projects.description: Saved an estimated $300K+ per year by leading development of a reusable enterprise RAG agent framework that now supports 5 internal AI projects.
projects.extendedDescription: Built reusable AWS infrastructure for retrieval, indexing, agent configuration, session memory, reranked search, logging, and LangFuse observability so teams can launch new knowledge agents without rebuilding the stack. The framework now supports policy search, onboarding support, HR knowledge access, vendor capability search, and call center assistance.
projects.impact: Powers tools used by tens of thousands of colleagues and standardizes chatbot delivery across 5 internal AI projects.

projects.title: Customer Financial Insights + AI Chatbot
projects.subtitle: In Development: Customer-Facing AI for Mobile and Web
projects.description: Lead development of customer-facing AI prototypes by designing data preparation workflows, LLM insight generation, and cross-cloud serving architecture.
projects.extendedDescription: Designed production-oriented AI architecture that aggregates customer data nightly, generates structured prompts at scale, and serves LLM-powered insights through AWS data systems and GCP inference services. Filed a patent-in-process concept for structured prompt pre-generation using SQL, Snowflake, Athena, S3, Glue, and Cloud Run.
projects.impact: Lays groundwork for AI experiences that could eventually serve millions of banking customers across mobile and web channels.

projects.title: AI Enablement, Workflow Automation, and Technical Advocacy
projects.subtitle: Helping Teams Across Huntington Adopt AI Effectively
projects.description: Drove responsible AI adoption by teaching developers, business partners, executives, and large internal audiences how to use modern AI tools effectively.
projects.extendedDescription: Introduced modern AI coding tools to the team and turned that early usage into enablement for others. Delivered presentations to hundreds of colleagues, wrote technical guidance for Copilot, Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, and AI chatbots, and translated AI workflows for engineers, business partners, and executive audiences.
projects.impact: Turns individual AI expertise into team capability through mentoring, documentation, workflow design, and presentations to hundreds of colleagues.

projects.title: AI Agent Skills Repository
projects.subtitle: Capturing Data Science Team Knowledge for Agentic Workflows
projects.description: Own the data science AI agent skills repository, capturing tribal knowledge so colleagues can reuse it through agentic workflows.
projects.extendedDescription: Built and maintain a repository that turns repeatable domain knowledge, workflow patterns, and implementation guidance into durable agent context. The repository helps data scientists move from one-off prompting to reusable instructions that improve consistency across projects.
projects.impact: Enables data scientists to reuse team knowledge through agent-ready context and repeatable workflow instructions.

projects.title: AI Document Processing Systems
projects.subtitle: Structured Extraction from Complex Financial Documents
projects.description: Built document processing workflows that convert inconsistent financial PDFs into structured outputs for faster business review.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed proof-of-concepts for loan document review and Federal Reserve report parsing by breaking large extraction tasks into staged LLM workflows. Extracted line items and key fields from inconsistent PDFs and produced outputs that business teams could review in spreadsheet and rule-based workflows.
projects.impact: Reduced manual review effort by turning messy multi-page documents into structured data for downstream analysis.
